functions.name: _contains_non_empty_change
functions.docstring:
Recursively check whether a comparison section
contains a meaningful change.

functions.name: comparison_contains_changes
functions.docstring:
Determine whether a scan comparison contains
documentation-relevant changes.

functions.name: _value_error_status
functions.docstring:
Convert common storage lookup errors into
HTTP 404 responses.

functions.name: _generate_and_save_understanding
functions.docstring:
Generate an LLM understanding for a stored scan,
save it, and return its ID and stored payload.

functions.name: _generate_and_save_document
functions.docstring:
Build HTML from a stored understanding and
save the generated document.

functions.name: sync_project_documentation
functions.docstring:
Complete documentation workflow.

The endpoint:

1. Scans and saves the project.
2. Finds the latest document.
3. Creates initial documentation when no
   document exists.
4. Compares scans when a document exists.
5. Creates a new version when changes exist.
6. Returns the existing document when there
   are no changes.
decorators: router.post('/documentation/sync', response_model=DocumentationSyncResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Create or update project documentation using one request')

functions.name: scan_project
decorators: router.post('/scan', response_model=ProjectScanResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Scan, analyze, and save a local project')

functions.name: list_project_scans
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/scans', response_model=list[ScanSummaryResponse], status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='List all saved project scans')

functions.name: get_latest_project_scan
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/scans/latest', response_model=StoredScanResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Get the latest saved project scan')

functions.name: get_project_scan
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/scans/{scan_id}', response_model=StoredScanResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Get one saved project scan')

functions.name: compare_project_scans
decorators: router.post('/{project_name}/compare', response_model=ScanComparisonResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Compare two saved project scans')

functions.name: build_project_context
decorators: router.post('/{project_name}/context', response_model=ProjectContextResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Build compact LLM-ready project context')

functions.name: understand_project
decorators: router.post('/{project_name}/understand', response_model=ProjectUnderstandingResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Generate and save structured project understanding using the configured LLM')

functions.name: get_latest_project_understanding
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/understandings/latest', response_model=StoredUnderstandingResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Get the latest saved project understanding')

functions.name: get_project_understanding
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/understandings/{understanding_id}', response_model=StoredUnderstandingResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Get one saved project understanding')

functions.name: generate_project_document
decorators: router.post('/{project_name}/documents', response_model=DocumentGenerationResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED, summary='Generate and save HTML project documentation')

functions.name: update_project_document
decorators: router.post('/{project_name}/documents/update', response_model=DocumentUpdateResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Compare a new scan and create an updated documentation version')

functions.name: list_project_documents
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/documents', response_model=list[DocumentSummaryResponse], status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='List generated project documents')

functions.name: get_latest_project_document
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/documents/latest', response_model=DocumentSummaryResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Get the latest generated project document metadata')

functions.name: get_project_document_html
decorators: router.get('/{project_name}/documents/{document_id}/html', response_class=FileResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK, summary='Open or download generated HTML documentation')

classes.name: PythonCodeParser
classes.docstring:
Reads a Python file and extracts its code structure.

Extracted information:
- imports
- functions
- async functions
- classes
- class methods
- FastAPI routes
- function content hashes
- method content hashes
- class content hashes
- syntax errors

methods.name: _calculate_node_hash
methods.docstring:
Creates a stable SHA-256 hash from an AST node.

The hash changes when the actual Python structure
changes, including:

- function body
- method body
- arguments
- decorators
- return annotation
- class bases
- class methods

Formatting-only changes generally do not change
this hash.

classes.name: DocumentBuilder
classes.docstring:
Builds a standalone HTML documentation file
from a saved project understanding.

classes.name: DocumentStorage
classes.docstring:
Stores generated HTML documentation files
and their metadata.

classes.name: AnthropicProvider
classes.docstring: Anthropic Claude implementation using the Messages API.

classes.name: BaseLLMProvider
classes.docstring: Common interface implemented by every AutoDocX LLM provider.

methods.name: generate_json
methods.docstring: Sends a prompt to the provider and returns parsed JSON.

methods.name: parse_json_response
methods.docstring:
Parses a model response into a JSON dictionary.

It supports:
- plain JSON
- JSON wrapped in Markdown code fences
- surrounding explanatory text containing one JSON object

classes.name: LLMProviderFactory
classes.docstring:
Creates an LLM provider from the provider name
supplied in the API request.

classes.name: OpenAIProvider
classes.docstring: OpenAI implementation using the Responses API.

classes.name: ProjectAnalyzer
classes.docstring:
Builds project-level relationships from parsed Python files.

The analyzer:
- maps project modules
- detects internal module dependencies
- collects functions, classes and methods
- discovers FastAPI router prefixes
- discovers include_router relationships
- builds complete FastAPI endpoint paths
- creates project-level statistics

classes.name: ProjectContextBuilder
classes.docstring:
Converts a complete AutoDocX scan into structured project context.

Supported modes:

detailed
    Keeps complete module, symbol, route, import, dependency,
    and content-hash information.

llm
    Produces a smaller context intended for LLM documentation
    generation.

classes.name: ProjectScanner
classes.docstring:
Scans and analyzes a local project directory.

The scanner:
- ignores unnecessary folders and files
- lists project files
- counts directories
- counts file extensions
- calculates project size
- calculates SHA-256 file hashes
- parses Python source files
- analyzes project-level relationships

classes.name: ProjectUnderstandingService
classes.docstring:
Builds LLM-ready context and asks the selected provider
to generate structured project understanding.

classes.name: ScanComparator
classes.docstring:
Compares two stored AutoDocX project scans.

The comparator detects:
- added files
- deleted files
- modified files
- added, removed and modified functions
- added, removed and modified classes
- added, removed and modified methods
- added and removed routes
- added and removed internal dependencies

classes.name: ScanStorage
classes.docstring:
Stores and retrieves AutoDocX project scan results.

Scans are saved under:

    workspace/scans/<project_name>/<scan_id>.json

classes.name: UnderstandingStorage
classes.docstring:
Stores and retrieves generated project
understanding results.

Files are saved under:

    workspace/understandings/
    <project_name>/<understanding_id>.json

functions.name: normalize_api_url
functions.docstring:
Remove trailing slashes from the configured
FastAPI base URL.

functions.name: get_project_name_from_path
functions.docstring:
Extract the final folder name from a Windows
project path.

functions.name: build_document_url
functions.docstring:
Build the FastAPI URL used to open generated
HTML documentation.

functions.name: parse_json_response
functions.docstring:
Parse a requests response as JSON and produce
a useful fallback when JSON is not returned.

functions.name: get_error_detail
functions.docstring:
Read a useful error message from a backend
response.

functions.name: sync_documentation
functions.docstring:
Call the all-in-one AutoDocX documentation
synchronization endpoint.

functions.name: get_document_history
functions.docstring:
Retrieve every generated document version for
one project.

functions.name: display_latest_document
functions.docstring:
Display the latest document before the user
starts a create or update operation.

functions.name: display_document_history
functions.docstring: Display all generated document versions.

functions.name: display_action_status
functions.docstring:
Display the created, updated, or unchanged
synchronization result.

functions.name: display_identifiers
functions.docstring:
Display scan, understanding, and document IDs
returned by synchronization.

functions.name: display_comparison_summary
functions.docstring:
Display scan comparison metrics returned by
the synchronization endpoint.

functions.name: display_document_metadata
functions.docstring:
Display complete metadata returned for the
generated document.
